scripts.release:check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.release:dry-run:next: pnpm run release:napi:dry-run -- --tag next && pnpm run release:lsp:dry-run -- --tag next && pnpm run release:publish -- --dry-run --tag next
scripts.release:next: pnpm run release:napi -- --tag next && pnpm run release:lsp -- --tag next && pnpm run release:publish:next
scripts.release:dry-run:latest: pnpm run release:napi:dry-run -- --tag latest && pnpm run release:lsp:dry-run -- --tag latest && pnpm run release:publish -- --dry-run --tag latest
scripts.release:latest: pnpm run release:napi -- --tag latest && pnpm run release:lsp -- --tag latest && pnpm run release:publish:latest
